key_sections.title: Mandatory KYC Requirements
key_sections.summary: PAN is mandatory for account opening. Aadhaar is a valid OVD. Form 60 allowed temporarily.

key_sections.title: Customer Risk Categorization
key_sections.summary: Customers classified into Low, Medium, High risk. High risk requires enhanced due diligence.

key_sections.title: Non-Compliance
key_sections.summary: Incomplete KYC accounts must be restricted within 30 days.
